title: CopernicusAI Knowledge Engine - Base Metadata Schema Template
description: Base template for all content type schemas. All new content types should extend this base schema.

content_type.description: Content type identifier (paper, video, process, podcast, image, animation, sound, application, model, dataset, code, visualization, etc.)

category.description: Primary discipline category - enables cross-modal filtering

year.description: Publication/creation year (YYYY format) - for temporal cross-modal linking

related_papers.description: Related research papers - array of paper IDs (pubmed_*, arxiv_*, etc.)

related_videos.description: Related educational videos (YouTube lectures, etc.) - array of video IDs (youtube_*, vimeo_*)

related_video_data.description: Related scientific video data (microscopy, astronomical observations) - array of video_data IDs

related_processes.description: Related process visualizations - array of process IDs

related_podcasts.description: Related podcast episodes - array of podcast IDs

related_images.description: Related images - array of image IDs

related_animations.description: Related animations - array of animation IDs

related_sounds.description: Related sounds - array of sound IDs

related_applications.description: Related applications - array of application IDs

related_models.description: Related models - array of model IDs

related_datasets.description: Related datasets - array of dataset IDs

related_code.description: Related code repositories - array of code IDs

related_visualizations.description: Related visualizations - array of visualization IDs

entities.description: Extracted entities (genes, proteins, compounds, concepts) for cross-modal linking

start_time.description: Temporal metadata: when entity appears (seconds) - for time-based content

end_time.description: Temporal metadata: when entity ends (seconds) - for time-based content

position.description: Spatial metadata: position in image/visualization (x, y, z, region)

quality_score.description: Overall metadata quality score (0.0 to 1.0) - NSF requirement: >=0.85

acquired_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when metadata was acquired

created_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when content was created

updated_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when content was last updated

deduplication_method.description: Method used for deduplication (null if not deduplicated)

metadata.description: Type-specific flexible metadata - use for content-type-specific fields not in base schema

license.description: Content license (CC-BY, CC0, MIT, GPL, public_domain, copyright, etc.)

embedding_id.description: Reference to vector DB embedding (for semantic search)
